The '''Cha Raaba system''', also known as '''Ylesian system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] that contained the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Nyrvona]] and [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}} {{C|as "Ylesian system"}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]''
